allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) tables = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for i, t in enumerate\(tables\): rows = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', t, re.DOTALL\) for row in rows: cells = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', row, re.DOTALL\) cleaned = [re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', c\).strip\(\) for c in cells] if any\(cleaned\): print\(f'T{i}: {\\" | \\".join\(cleaned\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', html\) text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\) for m in re.finditer\(r'\\d{3}\\s*ש.{0,5}ח.{0,100}', text\): print\(m.group\(\)\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'\(\\d{2,3}\)\\s*\(?:ש|ש\)', html\): start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-100\) end = min\(len\(html\), m.end\(\)+100\) chunk = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html[start:end]\).strip\(\) chunk = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', chunk\) if '01.01' in chunk or 'מינ' in chunk or chunk: print\(chunk[:200]\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'\(\\d{2,3}\)\\s*\(?:ש|ש\)', html\): start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-100\) end = min\(len\(html\), m.end\(\)+100\) chunk = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html[start:end]\).strip\(\) chunk = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', chunk\) if chunk: print\(chunk[:200]\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) print\('Length:', len\(html\)\) for pat in [r'01\\.01\\.202\\d', r'\\d{3}\\s*ש', r'מינימום']: for m in re.finditer\(pat, html\): start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-100\) end = min\(len\(html\), m.end\(\)+100\) chunk = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html[start:end]\).strip\(\) chunk = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', chunk\) if chunk: print\(f'[{pat}]:', chunk[:250]\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html\) text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\) for m in re.finditer\(r'\(\\d{3}\)\\s*ש', text\): start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-100\) end = min\(len\(text\), m.end\(\)+100\) print\(text[start:end]\) print\('==='\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'\(1[789]\\d|2[012345]\\d\)\\s', html\): start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-60\) end = min\(len\(html\), m.end\(\)+60\) chunk = html[start:end] if '"' in chunk or 'ש' in chunk or '&#' in chunk: clean = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', '', chunk\) print\(clean[:200]\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) idx = html.find\('179'\) if idx > 0: chunk = html[max\(0,idx-400\):idx+200] clean = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', chunk\) clean = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', clean\) print\(clean[:600]\) else: print\('179 not found, searching more broadly...'\) for m in re.finditer\(r'\(1[5678]\\d|19\\d\)\\s*ש', html\): start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-400\) end = min\(len\(html\), m.end\(\)+200\) chunk = html[start:end] clean = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', chunk\) clean = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', clean\) print\(clean[:600]\) print\('---'\) ")
